creator: ale_sagra@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 233194
trivial update of Makefile and distinfo

I am opening this bugs report to update:
 * devel/py-oci to 2.63.0 version [1]
 * devel/oci-cli to 3.7.2 version

[1] https://github.com/oracle/oci-cli/releases/tag/v3.7.2
[2] https://github.com/oracle/oci-python-sdk/releases/tag/v2.63.0

The update should happen at the same time for both packages since oci-cli depends on a specific py-oci version:
https://github.com/oracle/oci-cli/blob/master/setup.py#L32

Let me know if you need anything else from me.
